query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN peso % 1000 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_decimal,
  SUM(CASE WHEN peso % 1000 != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_decimal
FROM consultasPrenatal WHERE peso IS NOT NULL;
